message:
fix(http): update h1 server tests to use deterministic Time::ZERO constructor

Update all ConnectionState::new() calls in the h1 server test suite
to pass crate::types::Time::ZERO, matching the constructor signature
change from commit eaa4cbb9 which replaced std::time::Instant with
a deterministic Time type in ConnectionState. This ensures tests
compile and use the same zero-epoch baseline for connection timing,
maintaining test determinism.

Affected tests: should_close_connection_header_close,
should_close_connection_header_keepalive, should_close_http10_default,
should_close_http10_with_keepalive, should_close_http11_default,
should_close_keepalive_disabled, should_close_max_requests,
should_not_close_no_max_requests, connection_state_tracking,
connection_state_request_limit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
